answers.question: List of scenarios
answers.notes: The document includes a Climate Statement (pages 81-98, 100-102, 109-112) but those pages are largely image-based and not extractable as machine-readable text. No scenario names are present in any searchable portion of the document.

answers.question: Global temperature outcome by 2100
answers.notes: No temperature targets or outcomes (e.g. 1.5°C, 2°C, 3–4°C) are present in any searchable portion of the document. The climate statement pages are image-based and not extractable.

answers.question: Scenario provider
answers.notes: No scenario provider (e.g. IPCC, NGFS, NIWA, MfE) is named in any searchable portion of the document. The climate statement pages are image-based and not extractable.

answers.question: Pick-and-mix of SSPs and RCPs
answers.notes: No SSP or RCP identifiers are mentioned anywhere in the searchable text of the document. Cannot determine whether a pick-and-mix approach was used.

answers.notes: No language such as "downscaled", "adapted", "localised", "customised", or "tailored" appears in any searchable portion of the document. The climate statement pages are image-based and not extractable.

answers.notes: No participatory, co-design, deliberative, or collaborative scenario development language appears in any searchable portion of the document.

answers.question: Baseline scenarios
answers.notes: No baseline or reference scenario is described in any searchable portion of the document. The climate statement pages are image-based and not extractable.

answers.question: Model used

answers.question: Damage from acute physical risk considered
answers.notes: No explicit damage or loss estimates from extreme events (acute physical risks) appear in any searchable portion of the document. The climate statement pages are image-based and not extractable.

answers.question: Non-temperature variables in scenarios
answers.notes: No non-temperature scenario variables (e.g. carbon price, sea level rise, rainfall, oil price) are mentioned in any searchable portion of the document. The climate statement pages are image-based and not extractable.

answers.question: Scale of scenarios

answers.question: Time frames
answers.notes: No short/medium/long-term time horizons for scenario analysis are described in any searchable portion of the document. The climate statement pages are image-based and not extractable. Note: the action plan on page 94 references FY25+, End FY26, and FY28+ as planning milestones, but these are not scenario time horizons.
